RM 504 JUDGE CHOPPELAS, MBRADY/CSR, ALEONG/CLERK - C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE; CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEPBURN, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 325 SUTTER ST. #417, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108 $1,066.00 RENT, $550.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,616.00, LEASE FORFEITED, ATTNY FEES INCLUDES COSTS; EXECUTION OF THE JUDGMENT IS STAYED PENDING CONDITONS AS SET FORTH IN THE JUDGMENT.
